summary.en: A single-application DevOps platform spanning the entire software development lifecycle.
summary.zh: 涵蓋整個軟體開發生命週期的單一應用程式 DevOps 平台。

highlight.en: One of YC's most prominent enterprise-software exits, GitLab went public on Nasdaq in October 2021 at a ~$11B IPO valuation. It remains a publicly traded company (NASDAQ: GTLB) with annual revenue surpassing $1B.
highlight.zh: GitLab 是 YC 最知名的企業軟體上市案例之一,於 2021 年 10 月在納斯達克上市,IPO 估值約 110 億美元。它至今仍是上市公司(NASDAQ: GTLB),年營收已突破 10 億美元。

funding.en: IPO'd Oct 2021 at ~$11B; market cap a few billion as of 2026; annual revenue >$1B
funding.zh: 2021 年 10 月以約 110 億美元估值上市;2026 年市值數十億美元;年營收逾 10 億美元

sources.title: GitLab jumps 35% in its Nasdaq debut after pricing IPO above expected range
GitLab (GTLB) Statistics & Valuation

summary.en: AI-first healthcare company using its ScopeAI platform to expand access to medical care.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的醫療公司,透過 ScopeAI 平台擴大醫療照護的可及性。

highlight.en: Akido rebuilds healthcare delivery for underserved communities, pairing a clinician network with its ScopeAI assistant trained on millions of patient cases. It raised a $60M Series B in May 2025 led by Oak HC/FT to scale ScopeAI against the physician shortage.
highlight.zh: Akido 為弱勢社群重建醫療服務,結合臨床醫師網絡與其以數百萬病例訓練的 ScopeAI 助手。公司於 2025 年 5 月完成由 Oak HC/FT 領投的 6,000 萬美元 B 輪募資,以擴大 ScopeAI 應對醫師短缺問題。

funding.en: Raised $60M Series B (May 2025) led by Oak HC/FT
funding.zh: 完成 6,000 萬美元 B 輪募資(2025 年 5 月),由 Oak HC/FT 領投

founders: Prashant Samant, Jared Goodner, Sanjit Mahanti, Hugh Gordon

sources.title: Akido Raises $60 Million Series B to Expand Reach of ScopeAI
Akido Labs Secures $60M to Expand AI-Powered ScopeAI

summary.en: App-powered private mass-transit shuttle service for commuters in major US cities.
summary.zh: 為主要美國城市通勤者提供以 App 驅動的私營大眾運輸接駁服務。

highlight.en: Chariot was an early YC mobility exit, acquired by Ford Smart Mobility in September 2016 for a reported $65M as its first acquisition. Ford ultimately wound the shuttle service down in early 2019 amid weak ridership.
highlight.zh: Chariot 是 YC 早期的交通出行併購案例,2016 年 9 月被 Ford Smart Mobility 以據報約 6,500 萬美元收購,成為其首樁併購案。Ford 最終因搭乘量低迷於 2019 年初關閉了該接駁服務。

funding.en: Acquired by Ford for a reported $65M (Sept 2016); service shut down 2019
funding.zh: 2016 年 9 月被 Ford 以據報約 6,500 萬美元收購;服務於 2019 年關閉

sources.title: Ford is shutting down its Chariot shuttle service
Chariot (company) - Wikipedia

summary.en: Cloud eSourcing and RFx platform that modernizes competitive bidding for government procurement teams.
summary.zh: 雲端電子採購與 RFx 平台,為政府採購團隊現代化競標流程。

highlight.en: Bonfire became a public-market exit when GTY Technology Holdings acquired it for US$108M in 2019, merging it with five govtech SaaS firms into a publicly traded company. The platform handled over a billion dollars of supplier-selection decisions per month.
highlight.zh: Bonfire 在 2019 年被 GTY Technology Holdings 以 1.08 億美元收購,與五家政府科技 SaaS 公司合併成一家上市公司,完成上市退出。其平台每月處理逾十億美元的供應商遴選決策。

funding.en: Acquired by GTY Technology for US$108M (2019)
funding.zh: 2019 年被 GTY Technology 以 1.08 億美元收購

sources.title: An on-ramp, not an exit: CEO Corry Flatt on Bonfire's acquisition
Canadian cloud businesses Bonfire and Questica acquired by U.S. firm

summary.en: The largest English-language tech media company covering Asia's startups and innovation.
summary.zh: 報導亞洲新創與創新的最大英文科技媒體公司。

highlight.en: Tech in Asia built the region's leading English-language startup news outlet and community after going through YC in W15. It was acquired by Singapore's SPH Media around 2024, in a deal reported at roughly $30M.
highlight.zh: Tech in Asia 在 2015 年冬季營後打造出亞洲領先的英文新創新聞媒體與社群。它於 2024 年前後被新加坡的 SPH Media 收購,據報交易金額約 3,000 萬美元。

funding.en: Acquired by SPH Media (~2024), deal reported around $30M
funding.zh: 被 SPH Media 收購(約 2024 年),據報交易金額約 3,000 萬美元

sources.title: SG's SPH Media said to acquire Tech in Asia for around $30m
Tech in Asia - Wikipedia

summary.en: Packaging and shipping-supply platform for online brands, from small sellers to high-volume ecommerce.
summary.zh: 為線上品牌提供包裝與寄送耗材的平台,客群涵蓋小型賣家到高出貨量電商。

highlight.en: Lumi gave ecommerce brands a software-driven way to source custom packaging at scale. Post-purchase experience company Narvar acquired it in December 2021.
highlight.zh: Lumi 為電商品牌提供以軟體驅動、可規模化採購客製包裝的方式。售後體驗公司 Narvar 於 2021 年 12 月將其收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Narvar (Dec 2021); had raised ~$9M Series A (2018)
funding.zh: 2021 年 12 月被 Narvar 收購;曾募得約 900 萬美元 A 輪(2018 年)

sources.title: Narvar Acquires Lumi to Further Enrich the Post-purchase Experience
Lumi (company) - Wikipedia

summary.en: Planning software that helps cities design transit, streets, and new mobility systems.
summary.zh: 協助城市規劃大眾運輸、街道與新型出行系統的規劃軟體。

highlight.en: Remix grew out of a Code for America hackathon into a platform used by 350+ local governments across 22 countries. Transit startup Via acquired it for $100M in March 2021.
highlight.zh: Remix 從 Code for America 的黑客松起步,成長為 22 個國家逾 350 個地方政府使用的平台。交通新創 Via 於 2021 年 3 月以 1 億美元將其收購。

funding.zh: 2021 年 3 月被 Via 以 1 億美元收購

founders: Tiffany Chu, Sam Hashemi, Daniel Getelman, Danny Whalen

sources.title: Via buys mapping startup Remix for $100 million
Via acquires Remix to create the first end-to-end TransitTech solution

summary.en: Tooling for reproducible data pipelines, data versioning, and data lineage in ML workflows.
summary.zh: 為機器學習工作流提供可重現資料管線、資料版本控管與資料譜系的工具。

highlight.en: Pachyderm became a building block of the modern MLOps stack, bringing Git-like versioning to data pipelines. Hewlett Packard Enterprise acquired it in January 2023 to bolster its AI-at-scale offerings, after it had raised ~$28M.
highlight.zh: Pachyderm 成為現代 MLOps 技術堆疊的基石,將類似 Git 的版本控管帶入資料管線。Hewlett Packard Enterprise 於 2023 年 1 月收購該公司以強化其大規模 AI 產品,收購前它已募得約 2,800 萬美元。

funding.en: Acquired by HPE (Jan 2023, terms undisclosed); had raised ~$28M
funding.zh: 2023 年 1 月被 HPE 收購(金額未公開);先前募得約 2,800 萬美元

sources.title: HPE acquires Pachyderm as it looks to bolster its AI dev offerings
Hewlett Packard Enterprise acquires Pachyderm

summary.en: B2B remote patient monitoring using continuous respiratory sensors for chronic lung-disease care.
summary.zh: 以連續呼吸感測器為慢性肺病照護提供 B2B 遠端病患監測。

highlight.en: Spire Health pioneered clothing-adhered respiratory sensors that never need charging, used by pulmonologists across the US. Its 'Health Tag' sensors have been worn by more than 150,000 people.
highlight.zh: Spire Health 開創了無需充電、可黏附於衣物的呼吸感測器,獲全美肺科醫師採用。其「Health Tag」感測器已有超過 15 萬人配戴使用。

sources.title: Interview with Jonathan Palley, Spire Health's Co-Founder and CEO

summary.en: Travel company that built the world's first app-connected smart luggage.
summary.zh: 打造全球首款 App 連網智慧行李箱的旅行用品公司。

highlight.en: Bluesmart launched the first smart connected carry-on, raising over $2M from 10,000+ Indiegogo backers in 120 countries. It shut down in May 2018 after US airlines banned luggage with non-removable batteries, selling its IP to Travelpro.
highlight.zh: Bluesmart 推出首款智慧連網登機箱,在 Indiegogo 上獲得 120 個國家逾 1 萬名支持者、募得超過 200 萬美元。在美國各航空公司禁止內建不可拆卸電池的行李箱後,公司於 2018 年 5 月關閉,並將智慧財產權出售給 Travelpro。

funding.en: Raised >$2M on Indiegogo; assets sold to Travelpro after 2018 shutdown
funding.zh: 在 Indiegogo 募得逾 200 萬美元;2018 年關閉後資產出售給 Travelpro

founders: Tomi Pierucci, Diego Saez-Gil, Alejo Verlini, Brian Chen

sources.title: Bluesmart sells assets to Travelpro following smart luggage ban
Bluesmart - Wikipedia

summary.en: Maker of next-generation single-use, at-home molecular test kits for infectious diseases.
summary.zh: 下一代單次使用、居家分子檢測試劑套組的製造商,專注於傳染病檢測。

highlight.en: Lucira won the first FDA authorization for an at-home rapid COVID-19 self-test and IPO'd in early 2021 at a ~$628M valuation. After running out of cash, it filed for bankruptcy in February 2023 and was acquired by Pfizer for $36.4M through a bankruptcy auction.
highlight.zh: Lucira 取得首個 FDA 核准的居家快速 COVID-19 自我檢測,並於 2021 年初以約 6.28 億美元估值上市。資金耗盡後,公司於 2023 年 2 月聲請破產,並透過破產拍賣以 3,640 萬美元被 Pfizer 收購。

funding.en: IPO'd early 2021 at ~$628M; bankrupt 2023; acquired by Pfizer for $36.4M
funding.zh: 2021 年初以約 6.28 億美元上市;2023 年破產;被 Pfizer 以 3,640 萬美元收購

founders: Erik Engelson, Debkishore Mitra, John Waldeisen

sources.title: Pfizer Buys Lucira Health for $36.4M Through Bankruptcy Auction
Pfizer Acquires COVID-Flu Test Developer Lucira Health for USD 36.4 Million

summary.en: Clinical-stage company using a predictive precision-medicine platform to find blood-cancer therapies.
summary.zh: 臨床階段公司,運用預測性精準醫療平台尋找血癌療法。

highlight.en: Notable tests a patient's actual cancer cells against drug combinations to predict effective treatments, starting with blood cancers. It became publicly traded (Nasdaq: NTBL) in October 2023 via a reverse merger with VBL Therapeutics.
highlight.zh: Notable 以病患真實的癌細胞測試多種藥物組合,以預測有效療法,並從血癌切入。公司於 2023 年 10 月透過與 VBL Therapeutics 反向合併,成為上市公司(NASDAQ: NTBL)。

funding.en: Went public via reverse merger with VBL Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NTBL, Oct 2023)
funding.zh: 透過與 VBL Therapeutics 反向合併上市(NASDAQ: NTBL,2023 年 10 月)

sources.title: Notable Labs Closes Merger Transaction With VBL Therapeutics
VBL Therapeutics closes merger with Notable Labs, to begin trading under 'NTBL'
